text:
* Move pidfile to /var/run/callweaver
* Add AEL, SCCP, RTP2 config options
* Remove unnecessary . from rc.d script
* Make port always install .sample config files
* Simplify pkg-plist
* Bump PORTREVISION

First 3 points inspired by Max Clements
